payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input names the same person, Sara, but asserts a mutually incompatible close-family relationship with the existing memory. It is unclear whether this refers to the same Sara or whether one of the statements is incorrect.

details: Detected direct conflict between existing and incoming family relationship facts.
No new durable memory was committed.
Clarification is required before resolving or updating memory.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara as the existing memory.
If it is the same Sara, ask which relationship is correct and replace the incorrect memory.
If they are different people with the same name, create separate entities with distinguishing context.
